task_goal: Inspect a pinned FastQC nanopore report, decide whether the sample passes QC, cite failed modules, and choose the next action.
transition_mechanism: FastQC artifact -> parsed module state -> QC policy state -> verifier checks cited failed-module evidence and trim/filter next action.
domain_tools: workspace.list_files -> provenance.inspect -> artifact.read_text -> fastqc.parse_report -> qc_policy.evaluate -> verifier.submit_answer
expected_agent_failure: Anchors on one acceptable metric or warning module, misses failed modules, or submits uncited diagnosis.
next_capture_action: Convert current deterministic observations to replay bundle; run cheap baseline and verifier-passing reference trajectory.

task_goal: Inspect a pinned Qualimap RNA-seq alignment report and decide whether the workflow result is acceptable despite a high mapped-read percentage.
transition_mechanism: Qualimap artifact -> parsed alignment metrics -> policy state flags zero aligned bases and low mean mapQ -> verifier checks rerun-analysis next action.
domain_tools: workspace.list_files -> provenance.inspect -> artifact.read_text -> alignment.parse_qualimap -> qc_policy.evaluate -> verifier.submit_answer
expected_agent_failure: Overweights mapped-read percentage and misses aligned bases of 0 bp, mean mapping quality near zero, or evidence ids.
next_capture_action: Convert current deterministic observations to replay bundle; run cheap baseline and verifier-passing reference trajectory.

task_goal: Import NC_005816.1 plasmid pPCP1, inspect sequence context, add primer primer_pcp1_start_20 with sequence TGTAACGAACGGTGCAATAG, bind it to the molecule, and validate the workspace.
transition_mechanism: GenBank source -> molecule workspace revision 0 -> exact primer write with expectedRevision 0 -> workspace revision 1 -> validation checks sequence digest, primer alphabet, and binding.
expected_agent_failure: Adds primer without opening context, patches workspace directly, uses stale expectedRevision, or fails to bind/cite the primer evidence.
next_capture_action: Replace toy circular fixture with NC_005816.1 and recapture through datalox-molecule-biology.

task_goal: Import NC_001416.1 bacteriophage lambda, inspect the nu1/terminase small subunit region, add feature feat_lambda_nu1_review for bases 191..736 on the plus strand, and validate the workspace.
transition_mechanism: GenBank source -> molecule workspace revision 0 with imported features -> context query for 191..736 -> revision-safe feature write -> workspace revision 1 -> validation checks coordinate bounds and feature state.
expected_agent_failure: Confuses gene/CDS coordinates, writes a free-text answer instead of workspace state, or ignores expectedRevision and validation output.
next_capture_action: Replace toy linear GenBank fixture with NC_001416.1 and recapture through datalox-molecule-biology.

task_goal: Inspect public flowCore FCS metadata and compensation matrix coverage, decide whether metadata is ready for downstream analysis, and cite channel/compensation evidence.
transition_mechanism: FCS file + compensation matrix -> parsed channel/parameter state -> coverage/marker policy state -> verifier checks repair-metadata next action and evidence ids.
domain_tools: workspace.list_files -> provenance.inspect -> artifact.read_text -> flowcyto.parse_fcs_keywords -> flowcyto.parse_compensation_matrix -> qc_policy.evaluate -> verifier.submit_answer
expected_agent_failure: Jumps to gating/plot claims, ignores empty marker labels, or fails to compare compensation coverage with fluorescence channels.
next_capture_action: Convert current deterministic observations to replay bundle; run cheap baseline and verifier-passing reference trajectory.

task_goal: Open a public flowCore FCS file, create a main FSC/SSC gate, compute gate stats, validate QC, intentionally hit stale_revision on report submit, then recover with the current revision.
transition_mechanism: FCS file -> flowcyto workspace revision 0 -> upsert_gate writes revision 1 -> submit_report with expected_revision 0 returns stale_revision and preserves state -> corrected submit_report with revision 1 persists report.
domain_tools: open_fcs -> get_plot_context -> upsert_gate -> compute_gate_stats -> validate_gate_qc -> submit_report -> get_workspace_revision -> submit_report
expected_agent_failure: Stops after open_fcs, submits report without stats/qc refs, or fails to recover from stale_revision using current workspace revision.
next_capture_action: Recapture from flowCore B08 via datalox-flow-cyto-mcp instead of the old project-local CFP fixture.

task_goal: Inspect RCSB 1AKE, identify method, resolution, chains, AP5 ligand, and decide whether the structure is ready for preparation rather than claiming design/docking results.
transition_mechanism: RCSB mmCIF + entry JSON -> parsed structure metadata -> prep policy state -> verifier checks method/resolution/ligand/entity evidence and prepare-structure next action.
domain_tools: workspace.list_files -> provenance.inspect -> artifact.read_text -> protein.parse_mmcif_metadata -> qc_policy.evaluate -> verifier.submit_answer
expected_agent_failure: Claims docking/design readiness without citing method, resolution, AP5 ligand, or chain/entity evidence.
next_capture_action: Convert current deterministic observations to replay bundle; optionally add a later PyMOL viewer-state task.
